body:
As suggested in [comment](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1001#pullrequestreview-1155728511), this PR just renames everything that was denoted by `surface` or `s` with `bottom` .

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.

- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: GeneralizedExponentialStretching: rename s-> bottom

body: This PR adds a script for monitoring invalidations, so that we can incrementally fix egregious method invalidations (which can lead to slow compile times).
title: Add invalidations script
